name: faostat-mcp-server
description: Global food & agriculture statistics from the UN FAOSTAT bulk-download corpus, served from a local SQLite mirror with a DataCanvas SQL surface, over MCP. STDIO & Streamable HTTP.

interface.shortDescription: Global food & agriculture statistics from the UN FAOSTAT bulk-download corpus, served from a local SQLite mirror with a DataCanvas SQL surface, over MCP. STDIO & Streamable HTTP.
interface.longDescription: Query the UN FAO's FAOSTAT corpus — crop and livestock production, agricultural trade, food balances, food security, land use, and agri-emissions for 245+ countries from 1961 to present. Served from a local SQLite mirror of the keyless bulk-download service (the REST API is auth-gated), with FTS5 code resolution, country-vs-aggregate classification, and a DataCanvas SQL surface for cross-country and time-series analysis.
